title: NormalizedFailureSignature
description: Canonical fields for deduplicated failure signatures. Hash input is normative per docs/implementation/2026-04-13-persona-agent-platform-doc-precedence.md.

schema_version.description: Bump only with EM + Data/Memory DRI + Safety Owner sign-off and manifest note.

workflow_id.description: Must match a row in production-workflow-manifest.md.

normalized_message.description: Lowercased, template placeholders substituted, stack and paths stripped per precedence doc normalization pipeline.

tool_name.description: Empty string if no tool involved.

policy_rule_id.description: Empty string if no policy id.

step_id.description: Optional compiler step id when known.

criticality.description: Production no-repeat contract applies only to critical; assignment rules are normative in doc-precedence.

alias_of.description: Optional prior signature_hash this record merges into.
